title: Inside Sales Consultant
description:
About Propseller

In 2024, Propseller has been ranked #1 Fastest-Growing Real Estate Company in APAC by the Financial Times and #10 in Singapore’s fastest-growing companies 2024 ranking by The Straits Times and Statista!

In August 2022, Propseller raised a US$12M Series A led by Vertex Ventures, the VC arm of Temasek, the investment company owned by the Government of Singapore and the Series A lead investor of Grab.

Propseller’s mission is to help people build wealth with real estate. We’re building an end-to-end real estate transaction platform and towards that goal, we started the journey by building a technology-powered real estate brokerage that is valuable, reliable and fairly priced.

By elevating the most human part of the service with top in-house agents and industrialising all the rest with technology and centralised operations, we became Singapore's most loved real estate agent with an average Google My Business rating of 4.8/5 (700+ reviews).

The next phase of the journey is to go from helping people sell their homes to becoming the No1 brand for people to move from one home to the next: sell, buy, and finance.

Find out more at: propseller.com/careers/


Role Description

We are looking for a self-starter, and highly ambitious hustler to accelerate our growth and bring in more property owners and seekers into our pipeline.

As an Inside Sales Consultant, you are the first point of contact with the leads (property owners and seekers), driving engaging conversations and laying the foundations for their journey with Propseller. You will be responsible for managing the pre-sales consultative selling process from initial contact, lead qualification and nurturing, to the introduction to one of Propseller’s in-house Real Estate Consultants (i.e. property agents). As a trusted advisor to the leads, you will play a fundamental role in helping them achieve their goals whilst ensuring a smooth sales process.


Duties & Responsibilities

  • Manage the pre-sales process via various channels: calls, emails, chat, etc;
  • Introduce Propseller’s services and value proposition in a pitch to potential clients;
  • Understand the lead’s needs and provide thorough advice about the property market, regulations, and transaction steps (you’ll get extensive training);
  • Convert Marketing Qualified Leads who have contacted us via our website, or other channels into Sales Qualified Leads who will meet one of our Real Estate Consultants;
  • Drive high activity volumes - make 50+ calls daily;
  • Build strong relationships with leads and internal stakeholders;
  • Represent Propseller with top-level professionalism;
  • Drive Propseller growth by over-achieving KPIs and milestones;
  • Propose, launch and deliver commercial and operational projects within Inside Sales.

Ideal Candidate

This is a role for you if you stand for a high work ethic and customer-centricity. You may not be a natural-born sales person but you have the hunger to learn more about sales and real estate. Unfazed by rejections, you never give up and embrace the challenge. You want to develop yourself in a constructive work environment, in which you can get frequent feedback, from your manager and your peers, and improve every single day. You cannot wait to make an impact and be part of the PropTech revolution.


Requirements

  • Bachelors’ degree with at least 1 year of relevant experience in sales, sales support or real estate OR
  • Diploma degree with at least 3 years of relevant experience in sales, sales support, or real estate
  • Fluent in English and Mandarin with excellent oral communication skills enabling effective communication with potential clients;
  • Exceptional poise and presence over the phone;
  • The drive and resilience to maintain 50+ calls per day;
  • High level of client centricity: ability to manage multiple clients while exceeding client expectations;
  • Comfortable with using sales tools, technologies and systems;
  • Adaptable and flexible to work in a fast-paced environment
  • Work authorisation is required for this role;
  • Available to work one weekend day (Saturday or Sunday) as part of a five-day workweek, with shift hours (e.g., 8 AM - 5 PM; 12 PM - 9 PM) on a rotational basis;
  • Nice to Have (not required): Real Estate Experience or License.


You Get

  • Central, iconic office near Lavender, Bendemeer, and Farrer Park MRTs
  • Extensive training in Sales, Real Estate, CRMs. Be ready to learn a lot
  • Advanced business tools: MacBook Pro, Jabra Headset, fully-integrated CRM, etc
  • Opportunity to make history and help thousands of people with the biggest financial decision of a lifetime


Compensation

  • On-target-earning (OTE) of $4,500 - $5,500 (80% base and 20% variable) with uncapped variable bonus based on target achievement;
  • Employee Stock Option Plan, so that you can participate in our long-term success;
  • Medical insurance including dental with HSBC;
  • Annual leave of 18 days.


Possible Career Paths

Inside Sales Consultants are Propseller’s next generation of Senior Inside Sales Consultants, Team Leads, Real Estate Consultants, and Sales Managers.

Recruiting Process:

1. Introductory Call (45 min) – Online

  • Q&A session about your experience and motivation with the Talent Acquisition Specialist
  • Role-play exercise

2. Super Day – In Person

Experience the excitement of Propseller Superday: a full day of live challenges, real coaching, and high-impact interviews designed to uncover our next top performer.

One day, one chance, immediate outcome. No waiting for weeks, no delays.

Demonstrate your potential and walk out with an offer on the spot!

Start at 9:00 AM and finish by 5:00 PM, progressing through:

  • Round 1: Live calls
  • Round 2: Coached Calls
  • Round 3: Panel Interview
  • Round 4: CEO discussion

After each round, you either move forward or are dismissed.

Apply Now

No reply in 3 days? Beer’s on us!

postedCompany.description:
Propseller’s mission is to help people achieve the most when making the biggest financial decisions of their life: transacting real estate.


We are building the end-to-end real estate transaction platform, starting with the real estate agent service of the 21st century: a technology-powered real estate brokerage that is valuable, reliable, and fairly priced. To do that, we elevate the most human part of the service with top agents you can trust. Then, we industrialize all the rest with technology and centralized operations.


In August 2022, Propseller announced a US$12M Series A fundraising led by Vertex Ventures, the VC arm of Temasek and Series A lead investor of Grab. Propseller is backed by some of the best Venture Capital firms in the world including Vertex Ventures, ICCP-SBI, Partech, Iterative, Hustle Fund, Redbadge Pacific, Vulpes Ventures, Rapzo Capital and more.


Find out more at: propseller.com/careers/
postedCompany.name: PROPSELLER PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
